name: Zelt
description: Zelt HR and workforce management platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Zelt
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API Tokens
3. Create a new token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Zelt → Settings → Integrations → API Tokens → Create

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Zelt employees to verify HR platform access
